# UnderCut — Full LLM Site Guide

## About

UnderCut (https://undercut.ge) is an unofficial Formula 1 companion application.
It aggregates publicly available F1 data: race results, standings, driver/constructor
profiles, and optional live timing during race weekends.

## Locales

All public pages are available under locale prefixes:

| Locale | Prefix | Example home URL         |
|--------|--------|--------------------------|
| en     | /en/   | https://undercut.ge/en/  |
| es     | /es/   | https://undercut.ge/es/  |
| ka     | /ka/   | https://undercut.ge/ka/  |

Hreflang alternates are set in page metadata for en, es, and ka.

## URL patterns

```
/{locale}/
/{locale}/live
/{locale}/f1/seasons
/{locale}/f1/seasons/{year}
/{locale}/f1/seasons/{year}/{round}
/{locale}/f1/drivers
/{locale}/f1/drivers/{driverRef}
/{locale}/f1/constructors
/{locale}/f1/constructors/{constructorRef}
/{locale}/f1/compare
/{locale}/f1/circuits
/{locale}/f1/circuits/{circuitRef}
/{locale}/legal/privacy
/{locale}/legal/terms
/{locale}/legal/cookies
```

`driverRef` and `constructorRef` are lowercase slugs (e.g. `norris`, `mclaren`).

## JSON-LD structured data

- Home: `SportsEvent` for next upcoming race
- Driver profiles: `Person`
- Constructor profiles: `SportsTeam`
- Site-wide: `Organization`, `WebSite` with `SearchAction`

## Database entities (conceptual)

- Seasons, races, circuits, sessions (FP/Q/S/R)
- Results, qualifying results, standings (driver & constructor)
- Drivers, constructors, race entries
- Season champions (WDC/WCC)

## Environment

- `CURRENT_SEASON` — active F1 year (e.g. 2026)
- `DATABASE_URL` — PostgreSQL connection
- `NEXT_PUBLIC_SITE_URL` — canonical site URL for SEO (`https://undercut.ge`)

## Sync

Historical and current-season data is synced from Jolpica/Ergast-compatible APIs
via `pnpm sync:latest` and `pnpm sync:season` in the monorepo root.

## Disclaimer

Data may be incomplete or delayed. UnderCut is not affiliated with Formula 1.
